hero.title: From maybe to made.
hero.lede: I turn uncertain ideas into complete, working products—design, engineering, and the decisions between them.

caseStudy.title: The first world is this one.
caseStudy.summary: fullbuild.ai is being built in public: concept, interface, code, and every consequential decision.

stages.label: idea
stages.artifact: The confirmed brief: build a portfolio for people hiring complete AI product builders, and make every claim inspectable.
stages.decision: Make fullbuild.ai itself the first case study.
stages.constraint: No fabricated projects, metrics, testimonials, or experience claims.
stages.verification: Confirmed in the project brief and canonical content.

stages.label: design
stages.artifact: Three competing worlds, a hard originality test, and one visual system built from the winning direction.
stages.decision: Make one impossible seam transform the whole viewport instead of decorating a conventional portfolio.
stages.constraint: The new world could not inherit the previous visual vocabulary or hide weak content behind spectacle.
stages.verification: The selected direction stays distinct, legible, and complete from desktop to mobile.

stages.label: engineering
stages.artifact: A dependency-free DOM, CSS, and variable-type system with deterministic lifecycle states.
stages.decision: Make the seam itself carry navigation, content state, and material transformation.
stages.constraint: Complete meaning must survive without JavaScript, pointer input, or motion.
stages.verification: Contract tests pass locally; every material state remains semantic without motion.

stages.label: shipped
stages.decision: Keep the final material joint open and the shipment state locked.
stages.constraint: No reachable production URL or release evidence exists yet.

placeholders.title: Project title pending
placeholders.purpose: A complete product story—from unresolved need to working release.
placeholders.missing: Problem, artifact, and shipment evidence pending.

placeholders.title: Question pending
placeholders.purpose: A research story where sources become a product decision.
placeholders.missing: Question, synthesis, and resulting decision pending.

placeholders.title: Hypothesis pending
placeholders.purpose: A runnable experiment, including the failure that made it useful.
placeholders.missing: Hypothesis, runnable artifact, and result pending.

principles.title: One world, four laws
principles.copy: The same intent changes behavior as it crosses idea, design, engineering, and shipped.

principles.title: No invented proof
principles.copy: Unknown work stays visibly pending. Empty space becomes an honest, authored state.

principles.title: Mobile gets the whole idea
principles.copy: The signature, lifecycle, and next move arrive in the first small-screen view.

exit.title: Let’s build the whole thing.
exit.note: Contact details will replace this honest holding state.
